name: Viennese Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Chop pecans.
3. Add flour and chocolate chips to the pecans.
4. Grate lemon rind ingredients in a mixer or processor.
5. Pour the grated lemon mixture into the flour mix and combine well.
6. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake for 6 to 8 minutes, until lightly browned.
